# HotFab Welding

> Family-owned welding and custom metal fabrication company in Warren, Michigan. Founded 1999. Serving Metro Detroit and Michigan for over 25 years.

HotFab Welding specializes in custom metal fabrication, mobile on-site welding, and specialty metal solutions. The business is located at 13118 E 9 Mile Rd, Warren, MI 48089. Phone: (248) 259-9956. Email: hotfabwelding@gmail.com.

## Services

- [Custom Metal Fabrication](https://www.hotfabwelding.com/services): Railings, gates, fences, balconies, spiral and standard staircases, decorative grates, metal furniture, sculptures, and structural steel components — built to exact client specifications.
- [Specialty Metal Solutions](https://www.hotfabwelding.com/services): Storm shields, flood protection barriers, security panels, custom prototypes, one-off designs, and artistic metal sculptures and installations.
- [Mobile On-Site Welding](https://www.hotfabwelding.com/services): Fully equipped mobile welding team for on-site repairs and installation throughout Metro Detroit. Handles truck and trailer repairs, equipment and structural reinforcement, field fabrication, and emergency same-day service.

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.hotfabwelding.com/): Overview of services, stats, client reviews, and contact CTA.
- [Services](https://www.hotfabwelding.com/services): Full service catalog with materials, process steps, and project types.
- [About](https://www.hotfabwelding.com/about): Company history since 1999, welding capabilities, values, and team background.
- [Gallery](https://www.hotfabwelding.com/gallery): Photo and video portfolio of completed projects.
- [Blog](https://www.hotfabwelding.com/blogs): Expert articles on welding and fabrication.
- [FAQ](https://www.hotfabwelding.com/faq): Answers to common questions about services, pricing, materials, and process.
- [Contact](https://www.hotfabwelding.com/contact): Quote request form, phone, email, and location.
